requirement_title: Leading or trailing spaces in email
title: EP - Email with leading whitespace is trimmed
test_steps:
Enter email '   user@example.com' (three leading spaces)
Submit login form
Verify that the email used in the SQL query is 'user@example.com' (leading spaces removed)
expected_result: Email trimmed to 'user@example.com' before SQL query

requirement_title: Leading or trailing spaces in email
title: DT - Login with email containing leading space verifies trimming rule
test_steps:
Enter email ' user@example.com' (one leading space)
Submit login form
Verify that the SQL query uses 'user@example.com' (leading space removed)
expected_result: Email trimmed to 'user@example.com' and used in SQL query as per trimming rule

requirement_title: Leading or trailing spaces in email
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The server trims leading and trailing whitespace from the submitted email and uses that trimmed value in the SQL query for authentication.
coverage_items: Idle--login_form_submitted[email not empty]/Trim email; Use trimmed email in SQL query-->Done
